summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.negative: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Intel's stock jumps as chipmaker rides AI boom to fastest revenue growth in almost 15 years
raw_articles.summary: Intel rallied after the company reported blowout earnings and guidance.

raw_articles.title: Agentic coding goes hands free as OpenAI brings GPT-Live's full duplex voice control to Codex and ChatGPT on the desktop
raw_articles.summary: Two weeks after debuting its more naturalistic GPT-Live audio AI model with full-duplex capabilities (listening and speaking at the same time), OpenAI is bringing it directly into developer workflows. The company announced that GPT-Live now powers the ChatGPT desktop application on macOS and Windows, integrating directly with agentic systems like Codex and ChatGPT Work (which are separate experiences available in the ChatGPT desktop app). raw_articles.title: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
raw_articles.summary: Amazon is launching an update to its Alexa Plus assistant that will allow it to connect to smart home devices in new ways. With the update, Alexa Plus can link up with tech from Bosch, Delta, Ecovacs, iRobot, Yale Home, Whirlpool, Tapo, Eufy, and others, while automatically routing requests to the correct device. In an […]

raw_articles.title: OpenAI's Hugging Face hack triggers 'AI Kill Switch' bill in Congress
raw_articles.summary: OpenAI disclosed this week that some of its AI models went rogue and hacked into open-source developer platform Hugging Face.

raw_articles.title: What the OpenAI-Hugging Face Hack Means for Enterprises
raw_articles.summary: The incident is a lesson for enterprises that they need to implement appropriate cybersecurity guidance and keep their data within safe confines.

raw_articles.title: Cerebras stock gains on AMD partnership
raw_articles.summary: Cerebras and AMD agreed to work together, pairing their technology for AI systems.

raw_articles.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
raw_articles.summary: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

raw_articles.title: IBM's Krishna tries to reassure investors that AI won't disrupt company's software unit
raw_articles.summary: IBM's CEO highlighted growing mainframe hardware capacity, and said software should "catch back up" within a year.

raw_articles.title: Schneider Electric, AMD Unveil Blueprint for AI Factory Deployments
raw_articles.summary: The companies’ design supports AI racks of up to 246kW.

raw_articles.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
raw_articles.summary: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

raw_articles.title: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
raw_articles.summary: Until now, voice mode has only been available on Claude Haiku, Anthropic's faster but less powerful model. Now the company is making its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and extending its reach into apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva. When Anthropic launched voice mode last year, it was primarily focused on delivering […]

raw_articles.title: Meta’s New Feel-Good AI Ad Uses a Song About the World Ending
raw_articles.summary: The clip features the David Bowie track “Five Years,” which includes lyrics such as “Earth was really dying (dying).”

raw_articles.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
raw_articles.summary: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

raw_articles.title: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
raw_articles.summary: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of its workers, or around 93 employees, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a memo to employees, Patreon CEO Jack Conte writes that the company isn't making these changes "because we believe AI replaces humans," but says AI has "fundamentally transformed the tech industry, including how we work, […]

raw_articles.title: Black Forest Labs launches FLUX 3 capable of generating images and 20-second video with audio — but in limited release to start
raw_articles.summary: Black Forest Labs (BFL) is expanding its FLUX family beyond image generation with today's launch of FLUX 3, a multimodal frontier model trained to understand and generate images, or combined audio/video clips up to 20 seconds from a single prompt — and to extend the same underlying architecture to robotic vision and actions.The Freiburg, Germany-based AI lab says FLUX 3 is jointly trained across those modalities rather than assembling separate image, video and audio models behind a common i
